topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
keyPointsSummary: Simple Future: action that will happen (I will eat rice)
Future Continuous: ongoing action at a future time (I will be eating rice at 8 pm)
Future Perfect: action completed before a future point (I will have eaten rice by 8 pm)
Future Perfect Continuous: ongoing action up to a future point (I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm)

quickQuiz.hindi: 8 बजे मैं खाना खा रहा होऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: I will be eating food at 8 pm.

quickQuiz.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं खाना खा चुका होऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.

quickQuiz.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
She will go to work tomorrow.

quickQuiz.hindi: 5 बजे वह काम कर रही होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: She will be working at 5 pm.

quickQuiz.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: She will have finished her work by 5 pm.

quickQuiz.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
They will go to school tomorrow.
They will be playing at 3 pm.

mustRememberRules: Simple Future: action that will happen (I will eat rice)
Future Continuous: ongoing action at a future time (I will be eating rice at 8 pm)
Future Perfect: action completed before a future point (I will have eaten rice by 8 pm)
Future Perfect Continuous: ongoing action up to a future point (I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm)
